name: Tilapia Piccata
tagline: Pan-seared tilapia in lemon-caper butter — speed-dinner classic
highlight: Twenty-minute weeknight piccata — no shellfish, big flavor

hero.alt: Tilapia piccata in lemon caper sauce
hero.caption: tilapia piccata — fast weeknight

healthFacts: Tilapia is mild and lean — about 23g protein per 4oz.
Capers are sodium-rich; rinse if you're watching salt.

steps.title: Dredge
steps.detail: Pat tilapia dry; salt and pepper. Dredge in flour, shake excess.

steps.title: Sear quick
steps.detail: Heat olive oil and 1 tbsp butter in a wide pan over medium-high. Cook fillets 2 min per side until golden. Pull to a plate.
steps.tip: Tilapia cooks in 4 minutes total. Don't walk away.

steps.title: Pan sauce
steps.detail: Add 1 tbsp butter and garlic to the pan, sizzle 30 sec. Pour wine and lemon, scrape fond, add capers; reduce 90 sec.
steps.tip: Capers' brine + wine = built-in seasoning. Hold the salt.

steps.title: Mount and serve
steps.detail: Off heat, swirl in remaining 2 tbsp butter. Return fish to coat. Scatter parsley; serve with rice or pasta.
steps.tip: Off heat for the butter mount = silky, not broken.
